title: Parks and Recreation gif. Chris Pratt as Andy lights up in excited surprise as he reacts to shocking news with his mouth agape.
Video gif. A gray and white cat looks around with wide eyes and jaw dropped in shock.
Matt Leblanc Wow GIF by NowThis
Surprised No Way GIF by Laff
Celebrity gif. In a black and white I Love Lucy episode, Lucille Ball opens her eyes wide in surprised delight, as she says, “ooooh.”
Movie gif. Samuel L Jackson as John Shaft in the movie Shaft looks taken aback, stunned into silence.
Movie gif. A surprised Minion from Despicable Me turns away, lowers its arms, and looks around with a shout. Text, "What?!!"
Sports gif. Terrence Ross' eyes dart around as his facial expression seems to say "yikes!"
Meme gif. The "blinking white guy" meme: a closeup of a man blinking with downplayed surprise.
Wildlife gif. A white owl turns his head to look straight at us and has an expression of pure shock. Its eyes are wide and its mouth is open as if gasping.
Celebrity gif. Desus Nice in a Yankees baseball cap falls back in a leather chair with amusement and surprise like he just figured out a clever joke.
Video gif. A pug lying on a couch looking back at us and stretching, seeming to be appalled.
TV gif. Wearing a grayish-blue head wrap and large hoop earrings, Alicia Keys from The Voice gives us a stunned, smiling, slack-jawed blink.
Excuse Me Reaction GIF by Kiaundra Jackson
Surprised Nbc GIF by Saturday Night Live
No Way Wow GIF by Productions Deferlantes
TV gif. Tituss Burgess as host of the Late Late Show holds his hands up in surrender and leans back in a guest chair as he shakes his head with a look of shock on his face.
Golden Retrievers Wow GIF by Berk's Beans Coffee
Jim Carrey Reaction GIF by MOODMAN
Celebrity gif. Tiffany Pollard sits up straight and leans back, widening her eyes and pressing her hand to her chest, in shock.
What The Hell Wow GIF by iQiyi
Video gif. A cute kid holds his hands over his eyes and then opens them, eyes wide in surprise and yells, “Oh my gosh!!!!”
Shocked The Chase GIF by ABC Network
Video gif. A white and gray cat’s mouth is open wide in shock, like it’s gasping. It looks at us wide-eyed and then to the side as if to get a better look.
Confused Elmer Fudd GIF by Looney Tunes
Wildlife gif. A snow white owl turns around to face us, its beak open and its eyes wide in an almost human expression of shock.
Schitts Creek Wtf GIF by CBC
Oh My God Reaction GIF by Rodney Dangerfield
SNL gif. Kenan Thompson as Diondre Cole perks up with intrigue, looking around wide-eyed and smiling as if to gauge onlookers' reactions.
Surprised Spongebob Squarepants GIF by The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge On The Run

Movie gif. Gary Cole as Cotton McKnight from Dodgeball wears an announcer headset and glasses that rest at the very bottom of the bridge of his nose. He stares in shock, as if he’s seeing something that’s never been done before. He says, “Oh my sweet jesus.” and slowly takes his glasses off to get a better look.
Schitts Creek Comedy GIF by CBC
Video gif. A shocked man has his baseball cap turned to the side and his eyes are wide. His mouth is open and he looks utterly shocked.
Five Nights At Freddys What GIF
Sponsored gif. Alan Cumming as host of The Traitors dressed in a plaid hat and a furry teal scarf gives a cheeky smile. Text reads, “Who doesn’t like surprises?”

Video gif. Black and white closeup of Buddy Ebsen as Jed Clampett on "The Beverly Hillbillies" wearing a cowboy hat as he slowly looks from side to side like he's studying someone passing by, saying "Weeeeell doggy!'
Shocked Luther Vandross GIF by Dobbi Apparel
Celebrity gif. A surprised James Earl Jones drops his jaw and opens his eyes wide in disbelief.
Wide Eyed Reaction GIF by MOODMAN
TV gif. John C Reilly as Dr Steve Brule takes off his glasses with shock, cross-eyed.
Surprise Wow GIF by Pudgy Penguins
Video gif. A wide-eyed kitten makes a shocked expression before curling its paw up to cover its mouth in surprise.
Celebrity gif. Benny Hill looks around wildly confused then looks directly at us. Yellow text reads, “WTF???!!!”
